case_title: MARIO SALINAS et al VS. THE SERVICEMASTER COMPANY, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: MOTION TO STAY PROCEEDINGS PENDING ARBITRATION FILED BY DEFENDANT THE SERVICEMASTER COMPANY, INC. THE TERMINIX INTERNATIONAL COMPANY, L.P. TERMINIX INTERNATIONAL, INC. HEARING SET FOR NOV-06-2012 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

AND TERMINIX INTERNATIONAL, INCORPORATED'S MOTION TO STAY PROCEEDINGS PENDING ARBITRATION PURSUANT TO PLAINTIFFS DEMAND FOR ARBITRATION IS GRANTED. THE RESPONDING PARTY DOES NOT OPPOSE THE MOTION. Motion To Stay Proceedings Pending Arbitration
Off Calendar Nov-06-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:
DEFENDANTS THE SERVICEMASTER COMPANY, INC., THE TERMINIX INTERNATIONAL COMPANY, L.P. AND TERMINIX INTERNATIONAL, INCORPORATED'S Motion To Stay Proceedings Pending Arbitration Pursuant to PLaintiffs Demand for arbitration is granted. The responding party does not oppose the motion. ORDER SIGNED WITH THE MOVING PAPERS. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Angie Diner CSR # 9581 =302/EG
